name: HMS Lord Hailsham (FY 109)
events: 27 Jul 1940 With her trials and training completed, HMS Talisman (Lt.Cdr. P.S. Francis, RN), departed Rothesay around 1945 A/27 for her 1st war patrol. During the passage south through the Irish Sea HMS Talisman was escorted by the ASW trawler HMS Lord Hailsham (Skr. F.J.J. Cannon, RNR). She was ordered to patrol in the Bay of Biscay. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
